title: Automate sub category due dates
excerpt: When a sub item is created by an automation, I would like to automate the due date in that sub item as well. Would be nice to be able to set the due date automatically to 3 days past the current date for example. Thank y…

posts.author: B-van (Benjamin VandenBrink)
posts.cookedHtml: When a sub item is created by an automation, I would like to automate the due date in that sub item as well. Would be nice to be able to set the due date automatically to 3 days past the current date for example. Thank you!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @B-van

We developed an app called subitem automations that solves this use case. Here’s how it works -

Based on creation date →

Screenshot 2024-02-27 at 12.42.492060×346 27.7 KB

Relative to its parent item date →

Screenshot 2024-02-27 at 12.43.271992×386 42.2 KB

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
